stat: YouTube is the world's second most-visited website.
context: Establishes YouTube's scale as a discovery/search surface for B2B buyers.
needs: Confirm current ranking + deep URL via /browse before live use.

stat: YouTube has more than 2 billion logged-in monthly users.
context: Scale of the audience a B2B channel can reach.
needs: Confirm exact current figure + press-page URL via /browse.

stat: More than half of shoppers say online video has helped them decide which specific brand or product to buy.
context: Ties video directly to purchase decisions, not just awareness. Use in proof/framework posts.
needs: Confirm exact percentage, year, and deep article URL via /browse.

stat: B2B buyers spend only about 17% of their total purchase journey meeting with potential suppliers.
context: Most of the buying decision happens during self-directed research, so your video often IS the sales conversation.
needs: Confirm exact figure + deep URL via /browse.

stat: When B2B buyers compare multiple suppliers, the time spent with any one sales rep can be as little as 5-6% of the journey.
context: Reinforces that content, not reps, carries most of the persuasion. Pairs with the 17% stat.
needs: Confirm exact figure + deep URL via /browse.

stat: Around 9 in 10 businesses use video as a marketing tool.
context: Video is table stakes; the differentiator is targeting buyer intent, not adoption.
needs: Confirm exact percentage + report year via /browse.

stat: Most people say they have been convinced to buy a product or service by watching a video.
context: Direct video-to-purchase link for proof posts.
needs: Confirm exact percentage + report year via /browse.

stat: Search intent matters more than search volume: a low-volume, high-intent query out-earns a high-volume, low-intent one.
context: Principle (not a single number) Ahrefs teaches consistently. Use for intent/keyword posts.
needs: Confirm a specific Ahrefs article stating this via /browse, or cite as their consistent editorial stance.
